evals.prompt:
Generate a channel performance report with this data:

Google Ads: £30,891 cost (prev: £44,142), 54 conversions (prev: 104), CPA £572 (prev: £424), ROAS 2.40x (prev: 3.54x)
Meta Ads: £16,567 cost (prev: £17,952), 17 conversions (prev: 25), CPA £975 (prev: £718), ROAS 2.03x (prev: 3.26x)
Total: £47,458 cost (prev: £62,093), 71 conversions (prev: 129), CPA £668 (prev: £481), ROAS 2.27x (prev: 3.46x)

Period: Feb 2026 vs Jan 2026. Client: Acme Corp. Attribution: First Click 90D.
evals.expected_output: Dark-themed HTML report with KPI summary cards, comparison table with stacked-cell layout showing current/previous values and delta badges, SegmentStream branding
expectations: Output is a complete self-contained HTML file
Delta badges use correct color semantics: CPA increase is red, cost decrease is red
All numeric values use monospace font family
Has SegmentStream logo SVG in the topbar
Has 'Generated via SegmentStream MCP' in footer
No external CSS or font imports

evals.prompt:
Generate a minimal summary report with just these KPIs:

Total Spend: £47,458
Total Conversions: 71
Blended CPA: £668
Blended ROAS: 2.27x

Period: February 2026. Client: Acme Corp. Keep it simple — just the headline numbers, no tables or charts needed.
evals.expected_output: Minimal dark-themed HTML report with 4 KPI cards, no unnecessary components
expectations: Output is a complete self-contained HTML file
Does not contain a .data-table or .comparison-table (user asked for minimal)

evals.prompt:
Generate a campaign breakdown report with this data:

Google Ads campaigns:
- Brand Exact: £6,200 spend, 82 conversions, CPA £76, ROAS 5.2x
- Shopping Smart: £5,400 spend, 68 conversions, CPA £79, ROAS 4.8x
- Generic Broad: £3,600 spend, 28 conversions, CPA £129, ROAS 2.1x

Meta Ads campaigns:
- Retargeting DPA: £4,800 spend, 52 conversions, CPA £92, ROAS 4.1x
- Prospecting LAL: £3,200 spend, 38 conversions, CPA £84, ROAS 3.4x

Period: February 2026. Client: Acme Corp. Group campaigns by channel.
evals.expected_output: Campaign-level data table with row group headers separating Google Ads and Meta Ads sections, channel icons
expectations: Has .row-group-header rows for Google Ads and Meta Ads
Channel icons (SVG) appear next to platform names
Numeric columns are right-aligned with monospace font

evals.prompt:
Generate an interactive channel report using expandable rows. Data:

Google Ads (total: £18,420 cost, 198 conv, CPA £93, ROAS 4.6x):
- Brand Exact: £6,200, 82 conv, CPA £76, ROAS 5.2x
- Shopping Smart: £5,400, 68 conv, CPA £79, ROAS 4.8x
- Generic Broad: £3,600, 28 conv, CPA £129, ROAS 2.1x

Meta Ads (total: £12,640 cost, 128 conv, CPA £99, ROAS 3.9x):
- Retargeting DPA: £4,800, 52 conv, CPA £92, ROAS 4.1x
- Prospecting LAL: £3,200, 38 conv, CPA £84, ROAS 3.4x

Period: February 2026. Make channel rows expandable to show their campaigns.
evals.expected_output: Drill-down table with expandable channel rows using HTML details/summary elements
expectations: Parent rows show channel totals with icons
At least one <details> element is open by default

evals.prompt:
Generate a performance summary with insights. Data:

Overall: spend down 24%, conversions down 45%, CPA up 39%, ROAS down 34%.

Key insight: Both channels show a disproportionate conversion drop relative to spend reduction, indicating worsening unit economics.

Google Ads: CPA increased from £424 to £572 despite lower spend.
Meta Ads: ROAS dropped from 3.26x to 2.03x.

Period: Feb vs Jan 2026. Client: Acme Corp. Include an executive summary and warning callouts for problem areas.
evals.expected_output: Report with executive summary block, warning/negative callouts highlighting problem areas
expectations: Summary uses <strong> for emphasis and .num for inline numbers
